view.title: Validate explicit UC need #3
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a structured response showing impacted records and side effects is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 3 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a structured response showing impacted records and side effects is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided in the linked use case demonstrates that the dry-run functionality returns a structured response detailing which bookings can be moved cleanly, which conflict, and what requires approval. This aligns with the requirement to validate the explicit need for a structured response, confirming that the system meets the necessary criteria. The assessment of previous steps also supports this conclusion, as they confirm the system's capability to handle such scenarios effectively.
